def count_active_users(users: list[dict]) -> int:
    return len([u for u in users if u["active"]])


def count_errors(log_entries: list[dict]) -> int:
    error_count = len([e for e in log_entries if e["level"] == "ERROR"])
    return error_count


def has_enough_valid(records: list[dict], minimum: int) -> bool:
    valid = len([r for r in records if r["status"] == "valid"])
    return valid >= minimum


def count_matching(items: list[str], pattern: str) -> int:
    matches = len([item for item in items if pattern in item])
    return matches
